title: Add accessibility attributes to calendar day cells
description:
Calendar day cells lack ARIA roles, labels, and keyboard navigation support. Add:
- role='gridcell' on day cells
- aria-label with date and event count
- Keyboard navigation (arrow keys between days, Enter to select)
- Focus indicators visible in both light and dark mode

Acceptance criteria:
- Day cells have appropriate ARIA roles and labels
- Keyboard navigation works between days
- Screen reader announces date and event count
